performance_overview: Through 18 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-23) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -2.555%, alpha +2.49 pts. Today (2026-06-23) was the 12th consecutive no-entry session on a broad down tape (SPY -0.9632%); all 5 watchlist names (ANET, IBKR, FCX, PANW, MGM) failed entry criteria at every intraday check. Staying flat added +0.96% alpha. Last 5 sessions are all zero-trade, zero-P&L but consistently outperforming SPY by holding cash during sell-offs.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the only consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean, sample small)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap pattern; skip entirely
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 18 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. The extended/thin candidate pool prevents qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates. Policy is sound — no change warranted.
recent_market_context: 12 consecutive no-entry sessions (2026-06-01 through 2026-06-23). Recurring pattern: watchlist names gap up overnight to RSI 65-78+ then reverse (gap-up trap), or sell-off hard at open and recover only to overbought levels. SPY -0.9632% today (broad sell-off); VIX was 19.69 premarket. Today ANET -7% open, IBKR -4.3%, FCX -7.7% — then all recovered intraday to RSI 65-66 (above ceiling). Cash has been the correct position through this choppy, extended-then-reversal market.
notes_for_next_session:
FOR PREMARKET AGENT (2026-06-24 ~8:30 AM).

BOOK STATE: Flat. Equity $99,938.80. 0 PDT trades used today. No open positions.

EOD RECAP (2026-06-23): 12th consecutive no-entry session. SPY -0.9632% on broad sell-off. Watchlist (ANET, IBKR, FCX, PANW, MGM) cleared — rebuild fresh tonight.

PATTERN TO WATCH: ANET, IBKR, FCX all gapped down -4% to -8% at open, then recovered sharply to RSI 65-66 by end of day. If they consolidate overnight and open constructively in the RSI 50-58 range with rel_vol >= 1.3 and green on day, they could offer valid next-day setups. Watch pre-market move size — flag PM moves >2.5% as elevated-gap-risk (prior pattern).

HARD RULES UNCHANGED: RSI 55-60 (ceiling at 60, no exceptions), rel_vol >= 1.3, ATR% >= 0.30, green on day, above prior-day high at entry. Do NOT chase names at RSI 65+. Today confirmed again: gap-down-then-recovery to 65+ is NOT a valid setup.

SPY REGIME CHECK: EMA-9 was still above EMA-21 at midday (trending-up) but back-to-back down days. Verify fresh at 8:30 AM. If VIX > 25, apply regime-down single-position cap.

UNIVERSE EXPANSION NOTE: 12 sessions with zero entries suggests the candidate pool is too narrow. Consider whether RS_20DAY_MIN filter (currently 1.10+) could be relaxed to 1.05 to surface more names that open constructively in the 55-60 zone. Needs premarket scan data to validate — check evening scan output first.
